studyMetadata.title: Basic Pilot Study
studyMetadata.description: Testing the layout of the pilot study

response.prompt: How would you rate your experience interpreting data visualizations (such as charts, graphs, or diagrams)?
How familiar were you with each of the following visualization techniques before starting the study?
Have you previously taken a course in data visualization or information visualization?
Did you recognize any of the visualization techniques before participating in this study? If so, which ones?
Do you have any visual conditions that may affect how you perceive visualizations (for example, color vision deficiency, low vision, or uncorrected vision problems)? If none, write "None".
Did you use any strategies or notice any patterns while completing the tasks?
Were there any visualizations that you found particularly confusing or difficult to use?
Did you encounter any bugs, technical issues, or unexpected behavior during the study?
Is there anything else you would like us to know about your experience?
